title: Day 4 of Sabarimala reference hearing: Live updates from Supreme Court
description: Justice Amanullah: Why can't constitutional morality be interpreted differently in different scenarios? There may be parameters and different type of readings. Why blanket no reading at all Singhvi: In case of constitutional silence or absence of legislation or delegated legislation and where conventions, etc., are relied on, it can be used. Justice Amanullah: But it's a fluid concept. What happened in 75 years ago.. how does it impact now also. That time, someone wanted to introduce, and someon
